reason: Both cover the core points well (CFAA low risk post-hiQ/Van Buren, contract breach as the real exposure, state privacy/data broker law, C&D practical pattern). B adds the relevant FCRA consumer-reporting risk for hiring-related enrichment use and a more specific state trespass citation (CA Penal Code 502), giving it a slight edge, while A offers source links for verifiability. Close call but B is marginally more useful and complete.
